# searchArticles <kbd>Query</kbd>

> Search articles within a workspace by title and body content.
> 
> Performs a case-insensitive full-text search across the `title`
> and `body` fields of published articles. Results are ordered
> by relevance score (title matches ranked higher than body matches).
> 
> Supports pagination via `offset` and `limit`. Maximum `limit` is 100.

**Defined in:** `procedures.zmodel`

<details>
<summary>Declaration · <code>procedures.zmodel</code></summary>

```prisma
procedure searchArticles(
    workspaceId: String,
    query: String,
    offset: Int?,
    limit: Int?
): Article[]
```

</details>
